items.title: Circle back to Alex Salazar with partner-review thoughts on Arcade confirmatory answers
items.context: Alex responded Apr 14 with detailed answers to all 7 confirmatory questions (competitors, RFPs, NHI, compliance, audit logging, MCP/A2A, KYA). Daria had committed to 'circle back with our thoughts by end of week' in her Apr 8 email, so a response is expected this week.

items.title: Prep for DBGorilla intro call on Apr 16 (Series A, autonomous database ops)
items.context: Teams call 'Fin Capital <> DBGorilla' scheduled Apr 16 at 1pm ET with Chris Lalonde and Stephen Nolan. Warm intro from Janet Bannister (Staircase Ventures) describing DBGorilla as Series A pioneering autonomous database operations with several customers and a growing pipeline.

items.title: Send post-meeting follow-up notes to Sean at LotLine after Apr 14 Teams call
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> LotLine' took place Apr 14 2:30pm ET. No follow-up recap has been sent yet; Sean had previously expressed interest in continuing to explore the cost-segregation partnership.

items.title: Complete follow-up diligence on Orchid (2025 ARR miss, RTX ARR reconciliation, Chevron concentration, GSI channel economics)
items.context: Roy sent inline answers Apr 15: 2025 ARR came in at $2.6M (RTX slipped 4 weeks, now $3.5M as of March end; RTX deal closed 3/30 with $832K ARR / $3.9M CRR). Average deal $300K with 154% NRR land-and-expand; GSI cycles ~6 months, ~67% margins. Jake committed to 'continue to do some more work here and standby as lead/terms get solidified'.

items.title: Review Met.IO 2026 Requirements ahead of 4pm ET MetLife call today (Apr 15)
items.context: Calendar event 'Met.IO 2026 Requirements Discussion - Fin Capital / MetLife' today at 4pm ET with innovationoffice@metlife.com, Allison, Richie, Stephanie, and Lissette. LP innovation program requirements discussion — pre-read on Met.IO 2026 requirements needed before the call.

items.title: Prep for Fubon LP in-person meeting at NYC office on Apr 20
items.context: Calendar event 'Meet in NYC: Fubon <> Fin Capital' Apr 20 1:30pm ET at 114 Crosby 12th floor with Wei Chen, Annie Chang (Taiwan Life), and David Pan (Fubon). Strategic LP meeting — assemble portfolio update / fund materials.
